name: Sandbox
description:
"Anyone, anywhere, anytime. Anything"

You can use this place however you want. You can create things, start events and bring every imaginable character alive. Or remove them. Or remove everything and start painting your own world from beginning. Again and again.

Use slash (/...) to write "commands" to sandbox (yeah, like in minecraft). Most common: /Create ..., /Remove everything. You can use it within scenario, like: /Force this merchant to gift me a hundred coins, etc. Feel free to describe them as intricate as you want.

Use chat memory to someway set scenario and characters (if there any) within current chat

Leave your reviews in the comments. I will update the bot if needed.
creator: AVIZVUL
